(function() {
    function getDataFromStorage() {
        try {
            var cacheStorage = localStorage.getItem('mage-cache-storage');
            if (!cacheStorage) {
                return null;
            }

            var cacheStorageDecoded = JSON.parse(cacheStorage);
            if(!cacheStorageDecoded.hasOwnProperty('customer')) {
                return null;
            }

            var customer = cacheStorageDecoded.customer;
            if(!customer.hasOwnProperty('_hash')) {
                return null;
            }

            var hash = customer._hash;
            if(customer.hasOwnProperty('data_id') && hash.hasOwnProperty('email_sha1')) {
                return {
                    id: customer.data_id,
                    em: hash.email_sha1,
                }
            }
        } catch(e) {
        }

        return null;
    }

    // Function to wait for ire to be available with try-catch
    function waitForIreIdentify(attempts, maxAttempts) {
        if (typeof ire !== 'undefined') {
            let data = getDataFromStorage(),
                em = data ? data.em || '' : '',
                id = data ? data.id || '' : '';
            ire('identify', {customerid: id, customeremail: em});
        } else if (attempts < maxAttempts) {
            console.log(attempts, maxAttempts);
            setTimeout(function() {
                waitForIreIdentify(attempts + 1, maxAttempts);
            }, 50); // Retry every 50ms
        } else {
            throw new Error('ire is not defined after waiting for 15 seconds while trying identify.');
        }
    }

    waitForIreIdentify(0, 300);
})();

 <section class="section section values widget p-0 black common-questions mobile-fluid" id="Values">
<div class="widget widget-html">
    <div class="content-container">
        <div class="content-wrapper">
            <div class="widget widget-image-with-faq margin-mobile-none margin-desktop-none">
    <div class="faq-with-image-container">
        <div class="faq-with-image-wrapper">
            <div class="fwi-img-wrapper">
                <img data-src="https://images.litter-robot.com/media/wysiwyg/animated/faq-lr5.gif?imgeng=/cmpr_50" class="lazy mobile" alt="An animated GIF of an orange cat jumping out of a white Litter-Robot 4" width="864" height="684">
                <img data-src="https://images.litter-robot.com/media/wysiwyg/animated/faq-lr5.gif?imgeng=/cmpr_50" class="lazy desktop" alt="An animated GIF of an orange cat jumping out of a white Litter-Robot 4" width="864" height="684">
            </div>
            <div class="fwi-content-wrapper">
                <div class="fwi-content-heading">
                    <p class="h3 mt-10 mb-10 color-black">Common questions<br><span style="font-weight:200;">from scoopers</span></p>
                </div>
                <div class="fwi-content-container value" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/FAQPage" role="tabpanel">
                    <div class="fwi-qa mage-accordion-disabled" data-content-type="faq">
                        <div class="fwi-content" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" data-content-type="faq-item" role="tabpanel">
                            <div class="fwi-question allow">
                                <h3 class="fwi-title" data-collapsible="true" data-element="question" itemprop="name" data-role="collapsible" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-expanded="true" tabindex="0">Will my cat actually use it?</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="fwi-answer" data-content="true" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" data-role="content" role="tabpanel" aria-hidden="true" style="display: none;">
                                <p class="fwi-item" data-element="answer" itemprop="text">Cats are generally curious and will investigate any new object. Cats that are already used to a covered litter box may be quicker to investigate. We recommend that you leave Litter-Robot turned off at first while your cat acclimates. Place Litter-Robot in the same location as the old litter box. You can leave the old litter box near Litter-Robot for a short time. Take a cup of litter from the old litter box and add it to the clean litter in Litter-Robot. The scent will be familiar, and your cat will be inclined to investigate. Once your cat ventures inside and feels the litter under their paws, they will know what to do. <a href="https://www.litter-robot.com/acclimating-your-cat.html">Learn more about acclimating your cat</a>.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="fwi-content" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" data-content-type="faq-item" role="tabpanel">
                            <div class="fwi-question allow">
                                <h3 class="fwi-title" data-collapsible="true" data-element="question" itemprop="name" data-role="collapsible" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-expanded="true" tabindex="0">*Will Litter-Robot eliminate all litter box odors?</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="fwi-answer" data-content="true" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" data-role="content" role="tabpanel" aria-hidden="true" style="display: none;">
                                <p class="fwi-item" data-element="answer" itemprop="text">Because waste is promptly removed and contained in the base, typical litter box odors will be significantly reduced with Litter-Robot. <a href="https://www.litter-robot.com/litter-robot-5.html">Litter-Robot 5</a> and <a href="https://www.litter-robot.com/litter-robot-5-pro.html">Litter-Robot 5 Pro </a> feature WasteID™—an industry-first technology that distinguishes between urine and feces for targeted odor control—a sealed waste drawer, and a Carbon Filter to reduce odors. You can opt to combine the Carbon Filter with <a href="https://www.litter-robot.com/odortrap.html">OdorTrap® Packs</a> to eliminate litter box odors through natural chemistry. We also recommend using an unscented, all-natural litter like <a href="https://www.litter-robot.com/litterbox-com-all-natural-clumping-litter.html">GreatLitter</a> to help with odor control.
                                </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="fwi-content" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" data-content-type="faq-item" role="tabpanel">
                            <div class="fwi-question allow">
                                <h3 class="fwi-title" data-collapsible="true" data-element="question" itemprop="name" data-role="collapsible" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-expanded="true" tabindex="0">Does Litter-Robot require special litter?</h3>
                            </div>
                            <div class="fwi-answer" data-content="true" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" data-role="content" role="tabpanel" aria-hidden="true" style="display: none;">
                                <p class="fwi-item" data-element="answer" itemprop="text">Litter-Robot simply requires clumping litter. We recommend a high-quality, standard-weight, clay-based clumping litter, such as our <a href="https://www.litter-robot.com/litterbox-com-all-natural-clumping-litter.html">GreatLitter</a>. Some silica gel litter beads and crystals can also be used with Litter-Robot, as long as they pass through the screen. Alternative, plant-based litters may also work, but these tend to form looser clumps that can cause condensation in the waste drawer. When using a plant-based litter, we recommend emptying the waste drawer and cleaning more frequently. Litters that do not work in Litter-Robot are the strictly absorbent, non-clumping or loose-clumping litters, newspaper-based litters, and absorbent wood pellet litter.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="fwi-content" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" data-content-type="faq-item" role="tabpanel">
                            <div class="fwi-question allow active">
                                <h3 class="fwi-title" data-collapsible="true" data-element="question" itemprop="name" data-role="collapsible" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-expanded="true" tabindex="0">Will the globe turn on while my cat is inside?</h3>
                            </div>

                                <p class="fwi-item" data-element="answer" itemprop="text">No, the globe will not turn while your cat is inside.     require([
        'jquery',
        'matchMedia',
        'domReady!',
    ], function (
        $,
        matchMedia
    ) {
        var footerMenuEl = $('.footer-menu > .ui-menu'),
            accordionElements,
            init = false;

        // Do nothing if element is not present.
        if (!footerMenuEl.length) {
            return false;
        }
        accordionElements = footerMenuEl.find('.menu-item-group');

        /**
         * Initialize the accordions.
         */
        function createAccordions() {
            if(!init) {
                require(['mage/collapsible'], function() {
                    accordionElements.collapsible({});
                    init = true;
                });
            } else {
                accordionElements.collapsible({});
            }
        }

        /**
         * Destroy the accordions.
         */
        function destroyAccordions() {
            if (init) {
                accordionElements.collapsible('destroy');
                // Not sure why these don't get removed upon destruction.
                accordionElements.removeAttr('aria-selected aria-expanded');
            }
            init = false;
        }

        matchMedia({
            media: '(max-width: 767px)',
            entry: createAccordions,
            exit: destroyAccordions
        });

        // Find aria-owns attr and replace for footer elements
        $('nav.footer-menu').find('[aria-owns="menu"]').attr('aria-owns', 'menu-footer');

        $('ul.litter-robot-footer-menu').attr('role', 'presentation');
    });
    </script>

<script>
// Lazy load the validation components once the form is interacted with.
require([
    'jquery',
    'domReady!'
], function ($) {
    var formEl = $('#newsletter-validate-detail-footer'),
        emailInput = formEl.find('[name="email"]'),
        submit = formEl.find('button'),
        inputs = formEl.find('input'),
        promise = null;

    /**
     * Load required validation components for the newsletter form.
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    function loadComponents() {
        if (promise === null) {
            promise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                require([
                    'Magento_Customer/js/block-submit-on-send',
                    'validation',
                    'mage/trim-input'
                ], function (submitOnSendFn) {
                    loaded = true;
                    submitOnSendFn({
                        "formId": "newsletter-validate-detail-footer"
                    });
                    emailInput.trimInput();
                    formEl.validation({"errorClass": "mage-error"});
                    resolve();
                });
            });
            inputs.off('click.newsletterInit focus.newsletterInit keydown.newsletterInit');
            submit.off('click.newsletterInit keydown.newsletterInit');
        }

        return promise;
    }

    inputs.on('click.newsletterInit focus.newsletterInit keydown.newsletterInit', function (e) {
        loadComponents();
    });
    submit.on('click.newsletterInit keydown.newsletterInit', function (e) {

        // Don't submit until loaded
        e.preventDefault();
        loadComponents()
            .then(() => {
                submit.trigger('click');
            });
    })
});
</script>

], function (
    $,
    _,
    customerData
) {
    var customer = customerData.get('customer');

    /**
     * Send customer data to GTM via data layer.
     */
    function identifyCustomer() {
        let data = _.clone(customer());

        data = _.defaults(data, {
            data_id: '',
            email: '',
            firstname: '',
            lastname: '',
            fullname: '',
            telephone: '',
            address: {
                city: '',
                country: '',
                postcode: '',
                region: '',
                street: '',
            },
            _hash: {

                sha1_email: '',
                firstname: '',
                lastname: '',
                fullname: '',
                telephone: '',
            },
            rockerbox: {
                id: '',
                email: '',
            }
        });

        window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
        dataLayer.push({
            "event": "identifyCustomer",
            "customerData": data,
        });
    }

    // For after section is invalidated.
    var subscription = customer.subscribe(function (newValue) {
        if(newValue.hasOwnProperty('data_id')) {
            identifyCustomer();
            subscription.dispose();
        }
    });

    // For after page load. Faster than above.
    customerData.getInitCustomerData().done(function () {
        if(customer().hasOwnProperty('data_id')) {
            identifyCustomer();
            subscription.dispose();
        }
    });
});
</script>
<script>
require([
    "jquery"
], function ($) {
    window.addEventListener(
        "message",
        (event) => {
            try {
                if (event.origin !== 'https://creatives.attn.tv') return;
                const eventData = event.data || null;
                if(!eventData) return;

                const attentiveData = eventData.__attentive || null;
                if(!attentiveData) return;

                const action = attentiveData.action || '';
                const email = attentiveData.email || '';
                const phone = attentiveData.phone || '';
                if(!action || !email) return;

                if(action === 'LEAD' || action === 'EMAIL_LEAD') {
                    $('html').trigger('gtmUpdateUserData', {
                        em: email
                    });
                }
            } catch (e) {
            }
        },
        false
    );
});
</script>

<script>
require([
    'jquery',
    'domReady!'
], function ($) {
    let els = $('a[data-smooth-scroll]');
    // Don't load if there are none.
    if(!els.length) {
        return;
    }
    require([
        'js/smooth-scroll',
    ], function(smoothScroll) {
        els.on('click', function () {
            let selector = $(this).attr('data-smooth-scroll');
            let element = $(selector);

            // if the element is inside a tab, activate the tab.
            let tab = element.closest('[data-role="content"]');
            if (tab.length) {
                tab.prev().find('a').trigger('click');
            } else {
                smoothScroll(element);
            }
        });
    })
});
</script>
